headline: Bitcoin just broke below its $60,517 200-week MA — the line that's always been the cycle floor
context: Fear & Greed sits at Extreme Fear (12) with BTC at ~$60K — the same setup that preceded the 2019 and 2022 recoveries.

headline: Core PCE inflation hit 3.4% in May — the highest reading since October 2023
context: The Fed held rates at 3.50–3.75% in June and raised its year-end PCE forecast to 3.6% — no cuts in 2026.

headline: 3 tickers worth watching this week

items.reason: Micron up 15%+ after AI memory chip earnings crushed estimates — data center demand is accelerating fast
Oracle beat EPS ($2.11 vs $1.89 expected) but fell 5% on $70B capex plan — potential bounce territory near $148
McCormick beat Q2 earnings (80¢ vs 69¢ EPS) — quiet defensive consumer staple gaining momentum

source: Source: TheStreet / Yahoo Finance / CNBC, June 2026

headline: Americans now spend 2.5% of every paycheck on interest — before rent or groceries
context: Revolving credit balances are up 3.8% year-over-year while real wages have turned negative — a tightening squeeze.

headline: 82% of active fund managers fail to beat the index over 5 years
context: Index funds with expense ratios under 0.20% consistently beat most managers. The math has always been on your side.
source: Source: SPIVA / S&P Dow Jones Indices, 2026
